resources.string: The serial number of the device is empty, and the OEM authentication failed.
R1 decrypts and fails to generate R2.

Your ring has enabled OEM authentication, but the OEM string set in this app does not seem to match the one written into your ring. Please check if the string elements in the `oem_array` in `res/values/arrays.xml` of the Demo project have been correctly overridden. After making changes, please recompile the project to generate a new APK file and retry after installation. If still fails, please contact our technical support.
All your signals, finally\nin one place.
Humotron pulls your wearables, labs and daily habits into a single, plain-language read — no more scattered numbers across ten apps.
Every signal comes with the reason behind it — what it means for your body, and the one thing worth doing next.
Raw health data stays with you. We turn it into guidance — we never sell it, and commerce partners never see it.
You’ve accepted our terms — these two are different: explicit, revocable permissions for your <font color="#cfe69a">health data</font> specifically, required before we read a single signal.
Use my health data to personalise
Lets Humotron read your connected signals to build your private profile. Never shared with third parties. Privacy Policy
Allows the encryption and safeguards that protect your information end to end. Data Security Policy
You can withdraw either consent anytime in Settings.
How would you like to continue?
Two minutes to set up. Connect a device whenever you\'re ready.
Pick up exactly where you left off.
By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
Now answer a few quick questions before you tailor your dashboards and connect devices.
A few details so your read is tuned to you — not an average.
Used only to interpret your biomarkers accurately.
Height and weight calibrate everything from heart-rate zones to dosing.
So what brings you to Humotron?
Explore bite-sized Nuggets, take knowledge tests, and go deep into health optimization.
Your journey towards a\nhealthier you begins now.
Don’t own the ring yet? Shop now

1. Connect your ring with charger
2. Switch on bluetooth on your phone
3. Press continue
4. Detect you ring
5. Connect
6. Successful
Follow the steps for a successful integration
Select the device you wish to connect and click ‘Connect’
Congratulations!! You are all set to start capturing health metrics with your smart ring.
View all metrics and take the next step
Your health is shaped by what you know!
This is your personal biohacking hub where science meets self-experimentation, and learning fuels mastery.
Short, powerful insights across health, physiology & performance.
Essential reads to expand & strengthen your expertise.
Progress through learning, take tests & earn your Biohacker Certification.
What areas of biohacking do you want to focus on?
You\'re In. Let’s Build Your Biohacking Mastery.
What areas of %s do you want to focus on?
Suggested books to fuel your biohacking journey!
Humotron Nuggets distill key concepts, insights, and debates from bio-hacking books like these — so you can grasp more in less time.
Too many books, not enough time?
Tap the summary icon to explore key insights before you commit to reading or buying.
Your default filter is set to your learning focus — but you can always browse beyond your core topics.
You\'re %.2f%% closer to becoming a Certified Biohacker!
Every nugget you consume builds your mastery. Keep the momentum going!
Why should I consider to master it?
How is the mastery score calculated?
Each test you pass takes you closer to Biohacker certification.
See how your learning grows as you consume nuggets—unlock tests at 100% in a sub-topic.
See where your knowledge is building up across your selected categories.
Your learning journey is shaping up! Based on your engagement, you\'ve shown strong interest in some categories than others. Now, you can choose how to progress further.
AI Generate Summary of User Feedback
You are %d nuggets away from an upgrade.
Power On the Humotron Wrist Band
Bluetooth is enabled. You\'re ready to connect your device. Please ensure it is turned on and within range.
If you don’t see the device you wish to connect, make sure it is powered on, the device’s Bluetooth is turned on, and try bringing it closer to your phone.
No %1$s data available for selected time period.
Time Spent in Heart Rate Zones

Insights build over time as we learn your rhythms.

 To get started:
 • Keep wearing your device throughout the day and night
 • We’ll unlock insights after around 30 days of data
Your responses help make insights more accurate, actionable, and personal.
Enough data collected — ready to compose.
Note: This assessment does not replace professional medical advice. If you\'re experiencing significant sleep issues, it\'s best to consult with a healthcare provider directly.
What would you like to chat with the Tron about?
A nutrition idea you\'re curious about
Insights are AI-generated & not medical advice.
What kind of data is shared?
• When to Take: %1$s\n\n• How to Take: %2$s
Manage AI Chat Settings\nin the Control Panel
Choose a metric to talk to Tron about
A nutrition idea you’re curious about
I couldn\'t find any specific insights for this metric right now.
Failed to fetch insights. Please try again.
Failed to fetch response. Please try again.
Analyze my %1$s over the last 30 days.
Help me understand my %1$s over the last 30 days and what I can do to improve it.
Add health data from past tests — securely and effortlessly. This further improves the insights generation.
We’ll extract relevant data points from health PDF and sync with your health profile.
Why upload your blood test reports?
Transforming your static health metrics from reports into actionable digital metrics on Humotron allows you to:
Monitor changes and trends in your health over time with detailed visualizations
Use detailed data to tailor health actions specifically to your needs, optimizing your wellness journey.
Keep all your health information organized and accessible in one place, ensuring privacy and ease of access.
Keen to know how this works?
How does the metric extraction from blood test report work?
We securely retrieve the PDF of your health report from your email, device, or even a photo.
The PDF is converted into text to enable data extraction.
We precisely extract key health metrics from the text.
The extracted data is integrated into your Humotron profile as actionable digital metrics.
Quick search for health reports in your email
Select & upload from your device storage
This feature does not access your email directly or store any unrelated information!
Allow access for Gmail to identify emails based on your keywords.
Input keywords for Gmail to locate relevant emails with the health reports.
Choose specific reports from the search results for import.
Confirm to upload these reports to your Humotron profile.
Select how you\'d like to import your report
These are the matching files found, they have still not been saved with your Humotron profile. Choose the ones that you wish to upload to your profile.
No matching PDF reports found. Please try different filters.
No account selected. Please go back and sign in.
Select a period to search within
Are you sure you want to delete?
General copy to inform customers that parsing is prone to error. so requesting to review the metrics and report incorrect inf the see issues.
If you already have a device and\nwant to connect with app, click here >
Two simple, non-invasive tests—blood and saliva. Combined with wearables and environment data, we deliver clear steps for better sleep, sharper focus, and a healthier life.

Gain comprehensive insights into your heart health with our Cardiac Biomarker Test. This test measures key biomarkers, including LDL (bad cholesterol), HDL (good cholesterol), Triglycerides, and HbA1c, which together offer a detailed picture of your cardiovascular health.
This test is designed to identify risk factors for heart disease and help tailor your health management plan. It\'s a proactive step towards ensuring long-term heart wellness.
Fasting Requirement: Yes, fast for at least 8-12 hours before the test for accurate results.
Medication: Continue your medications unless your doctor advises otherwise.
Hydration: Drink plenty of water; it helps with sample collection.
When to Test: Morning is the ideal time as your body is in a rested state, providing the most stable results.
The test itself will only take a few minutes, but please allow a 30-minute window for the appointment.
You will receive your results within 2-3 business days, with a comprehensive explanation of what they mean for your heart health.
A follow-up consultation will be scheduled to discuss your results and next steps.
Backed by data, powered by AI — these suggestions are not medical advice, but a guide to help you take action.
Are you sure you want to remove this item from your cart?
Know more before starting the scan
What does this scan actually measure?
What should I do with the result?

Run it when you feel mentally tense, overwhelmed, wired, or unusually low on energy — even if nothing obvious happened. It’s especially useful before a big meeting, after a stressful moment, or at the end of a long day.

This scan compares your current Heart Rate Variability to your personal baseline. HRV reflects how balanced your nervous system is right now — whether your body is in a calm, adaptable state or under strain.

If your state is balanced or thriving, it’s a good time for focus or training. If it’s strained or overloaded, consider short recovery actions — breathing exercises, hydration, a short walk, or reducing mental load.
We’re still gathering data to establish your average %1$s.

Please wear the device continuously over the next few days. This allows us to gather sufficient data to establish your %1$s baseline accurately.\n\nYou’ll receive a notification once your baseline is ready, and you can start your %2$s check.

Use this when you feel physically tired, wired, or “off” — especially if you\'re resting but feel your body is still working hard. It\'s helpful during afternoon slumps or before winding down for sleep.
It compares your current heart rate to your usual resting level. If your heart rate is higher than expected while inactive, your body may be under hidden physical strain.
If your load is elevated, consider hydration, light movement, posture reset, or avoiding stimulants. If it’s stable, your body is recovering as expected.
Use this if you feel foggy, low on energy, sluggish, or after being indoors for long periods. It can also be helpful after travel or poor sleep.
It compares your current oxygen saturation to your personal normal range. Even small dips can influence how alert or energised you feel.
If levels are slightly below your usual range, try deep breathing, improving posture, or stepping into fresh air. If normal, your energy dip may be linked to other factors like stress or sleep.
Use this if you feel unusually warm, restless before sleep, fatigued after workouts, or slightly “off” without clear reason.
It compares your current skin temperature to your personal circadian baseline. Small deviations can signal recovery strain, environmental stress, or rhythm disruption.
If temperature is elevated, focus on cooling strategies — lower room temperature, hydration, light activity, or earlier wind-down before bed.
Your HRV Stress Scan will take just 2 minutes. Hang tight, and we\'ll display your results shortly after completion.
Relax and remain still. We\'re now capturing your heart rate variability to assess your current stress level
Almost done! We\'re comparing your current HRV to your baseline to accurately determine stress variations.
Just a few seconds left! We\'re wrapping up the calculations to provide your stress insights.
All done! The results are ready.
Please scan again and make sure the device is worn properly.
Your HRV is stable. You\'re maintaining a good stress balance and healthy autonomic function. Keep it up!
Congratulations on maintaining a balanced stress level!
Stick to routines that promote a balanced lifestyle, including regular exercise, a healthy diet, and sufficient sleep.
Engage in mindfulness exercises such as yoga or meditation to enhance your resilience against stress.
Keep an eye on common stress triggers and address them proactively to prevent them from disrupting your balance.
Why is the balanced zone ideal?
The balanced zone indicates that your autonomic nervous system is in a state of equilibrium, meaning you are neither over-stressed nor under-recovered.
When should I check my HRV?
It\'s best to check your HRV at consistent times, such as every morning upon waking or before/after specific activities, to track trends over time.
What should I do if my HRV is in the Stressed zone?
If you are in the stressed zone, consider recovery activities like deep breathing, light movement, or ensuring you get extra rest.
Based on the recommended 3-month course, we suggest purchasing 3 jars to ensure you stay consistent with your health journey.
Shelf Life: Don’t worry about storage—each jar has a shelf life of 18 months, so you can stock up without hesitation.
You can edit the quantity above if you wish to.

Enable Location
Access or
Provide Your Post Code
to Proceed
Optimize your checkout flow. Store your essentials here once and breeze through orders.
Your promo code has been successfully applied
Track orders for your wearables, smart monitors, and home test kits.
Are you sure you want to cancel this order?

The average reading for this metric is calculated by measuring its value over a specific period (e.g., during sleep or waking hours) and dividing by the total time or number of samples, expressed in units like beats per minute (bpm), breaths per minute, percentage (%), or a stress score.

These averages are compared to established ranges based on general population data, adjusted for factors like age, sex, and body mass index (BMI), to determine if they fall into categories like Low, Normal, Optimal, Elevated, or Excessive. Suggestions are then generated by analyzing how far your average deviates from the ideal range, considering scientific insights (e.g., nutrient roles or lifestyle impacts) and your profile. For example, low readings might suggest energy-boosting activities or supplements, while high readings might recommend calming techniques or reductions in triggers.

Consult a doctor for medical guidance.
Your average over the past 30 days. This is your personal \"normal\" and can change over time.
The usual range for people of your age and gender. This is for reference only and not for medical interpretation.
Usage is %1$s. %2$s was worn for %3$d day(s) with last 10-day trend available.
Choose how often the ring auto-measures.
Your order has been placed and will be delivered to you soon.
Powerful tools built to help you go beyond tracking. Unlock deeper insights, smart guidance, and personalized support based on your health data.
Error activating subscription on backend server
This item is currently not available for purchase on the Play Store.
Let’s get you started to connect your Smart Weight Scale.
Let’s get you started to connect your Smart Blood Pressure Monitor.

• Switch On Phone Bluetooth
 • Power On The Scale
 • Step On The Scale
 • Scale Visible On the App
 • Select the Device to Connect
 • Device Connected Screen

• Switch On Phone Bluetooth
 • Power On The Bp Machine
 • Bp Machine Visible On the App
 • Select the Device to Connect
 • Device Connected Screen
The weight scale runs on 2 basic AA batteries. Put the batteries and step on the scale to switch it on. Stay on the scale till the device is connected.
If you don’t see the device you wish to connect, make sure it is powered on, the device’s Bluetooth is turned on, and try bringing it closer to your phone.
Weight scale is detected, tap on connect button to connect with Humotron Weight Scale Basic.
How wound up are you, right now?
Each scan reads a live signal and compares it with your own baseline in seconds, right on device.
Keep the Ring snug on your finger and rest your hand still while it reads.
Wear the Band snug on your wrist and keep the device close to your phone while it syncs.
What do you want to check?
Pick the reading that matches what your device is currently watching.
A quick HRV-style read that shows how settled your system is right now.
A fast check of how hard your body is working against its usual baseline.
See whether your oxygen level is steady or drifting away from normal.
Look for subtle temperature shifts that can show early strain.
Keep still while the device captures the signal.
Please stand on the scale to start the reading.
Hold steady while the scale captures your reading.
Make sure that the bluetooth for your phone is turned on and able to discover other devices.
Attach the BP cuff to your left arm, ensuring direct skin contact about 2 cm above your elbow.
Switch on the BP machine. Sit upright in a comfortable position and try to remain still.
If your device fails to connect, ensure it’s powered on and within range, and try restarting the device & app.
Place your phone where you can easily view the measurement progress on the screen.
Stay on this screen in app and click the start/stop button on the device to start the measurement.
Switch on the machine. Sit upright in a comfortable position so that you can remain still while taking the reading.
Please touch the metal electrodes on the right and left side of the device with the palms of your hand.
Sit upright and don’t move during the reading.
Stay on this screen in app and click the round button on the device to start the ECG measurement.
Your blood pressure measurement is in progress.
For more accurate insights, it\'s advisable to take multiple readings at different times.
Don\'t worry, it happens. Let\'s give it another shot to get your reading.
Please ensure your arm is positioned correctly, adjust your cuff, relax for a few moments, and try again.
Find answers, troubleshoot, or contact our support team.
Search for help (e.g. sync issue, blood pressure)
Track your support conversations and replies
Contact our support team and we\'ll get back to you.
Search for help articles, troubleshooting guides, and FAQs.
Didn\'t find what you were looking for?
Our support team is here to help.
Secure & private. We respect your data.
Get help with setup, syncing, and troubleshooting for any Humotron device.
Browse all our help articles, guides, and FAQs.
We typically respond within 24 hours. You\'ll get an email when we reply.
Tap a draft to continue where you left off and submit your request.
When we need your reply, your request will show up here.
Resolved requests will appear here once your issue is closed.
You don\'t have any open requests right now.
When you save a request as a draft, it will show up here.
We\'re waiting for your reply. Once we receive your response, we\'ll continue assisting you.
Can\'t find your request? Check other tabs or contact us.
Tell us more about your issue and our support team will get back to you.
1. What can we help you with?
Select the option that best describes your issue.
Please share as much detail as possible.
This helps us understand your issue better.
Choose the device related to your issue.
What seems to be the problem?
Choose the option that best matches your issue.
You can find this in Profile > Settings.
Setup, troubleshooting, measurements, and usage help for your Humotron devices.
Bluetooth, pairing, syncing, permissions, and connection help.
Order tracking, shipping, replacements, returns, and warranty support.
Payments, subscriptions, invoices, refunds, and account billing support.
Manage your data, permissions, privacy, and account security settings.
Features, dashboard usage, notifications, metrics, and personalization help.
AI-powered insights, subscriptions, and health interpretation support.
Attachments help our team understand the issue faster.
You can add up to 5 files.
5 sources feeding Track · synced just now
The more areas you cover, the sharper every reading and recommendation. 1 area still dark.
Every signal area is feeding Track. Add more sources within each one for sharper, more confident reads.
Every source you bring in makes your picture more complete - and every reading and recommendation sharper. With Humotron, more is genuinely better.
Decode triangulates every source into one daily insight.
Decode triangulates every source into one daily insight.
Reading is 8 days old · take a fresh one →

Track is empty for now. Add your first source and your readings start flowing in - device by device. Start with whatever you already wear; add more anytime. The more you bring in, the sharper the picture.
Whoop, Oura, Apple Watch, Garmin and 200+ more. We read your existing history straight in.
Adds sleep • recovery • heart rate • HRV
Ring, Wrist Band, Smart Scale or Smart Cuff - your own hardware, paired over Bluetooth with instant on-device scans.
Blood and saliva collected at home and posted back. 60+ biomarkers decoded into your metrics.
Short questionnaires matched to your profile - they capture the context devices can’t see.
Drop in any lab PDF and we extract every data point straight into Track.
Your data stays in Humotron. It’s used only to power your own readings and guidance - never sold, and never shared with anyone else.
Expand each metric with guidance & next steps
Surface the metrics most worth tracking for you
Add a wearable or pair a Humotron device to start the flow.
Upload a blood test and we\u2019ll map it to your metrics.
Pair the hardware you own. Each one brings its own signals into Track - pick a device to connect.
Don\'t have one yet? Humotron devices pair over Bluetooth and start feeding Track the moment they connect.
Recovery, sleep, HRV and temperature - 24/7, from your finger.
Continuous heart rate, strain and movement on your wrist.
Weight and full body composition in a single step.
Clinical-grade blood pressure and single-lead ECG.
Tracking and future metrics, one place.
Your blood pressure is sitting in a healthy range. Keep your current movement and salt habits.
Keep up regular movement to support circulation.
Hold steady on sodium to keep readings stable.
Total sleep duration tracks how many hours you sleep each night, detected from motion and heart-rate patterns.
Deep sleep measures the share of the night spent in the most restorative phase.
How your blood sugar moves in real time after food, sleep and stress.
Skin temperature trend, read overnight as a deviation from your personal baseline.
Expand each metric with guidance & next steps
Turn on Smart Suggestions to see what each reading means for you
Once this source has a few days of data,\nHumotron can spot patterns worth your\nattention.
Surface the metrics most worth tracking for you
How much cardiovascular load you have taken on across the day.
Blood + saliva · 60+ biomarkers, mailed to your door
Matched to your profile — fill the gaps devices miss
We extract data points from PDFs and sync them in
Every source you bring in makes your picture more complete — and every reading and recommendation sharper. With Humotron, more is genuinely better.
You can only add up to 5 files.
Decode tracks patterns, trends and outliers in your biometrics — saving you hours of analysis.
We’ve collected enough data for this window.
We are still collecting data for this metric.
Systolic BP is higher during work hours compared to recovery times.
During work hours Mon–Fri, your systolic BP tends to be higher than recovery hours. On 19 May it averaged 120 mmHg during work but dropped to 118 during recovery.
• Cortisol levels increase during work hours.\n• Work-related stress may contribute to higher BP.\n• Physical and mental engagement can influence BP.
Try short breaks to relax and breathe deeply during work hours.
Drink enough water through the day to support healthy levels.
Not tracked yet · tap to set up
%1$s, your %2$s is showing an interesting trend!
Recovery is lagging your training load.
Three signals point the same way this week.
Calms the nervous system and eases your overnight heart rate.
Why this: Glycinate is the best-supported form for sleep quality and recovery.
Why you: Your low HRV and shorter deep sleep point to a system not downshifting at night.
Why now: Three nights of reduced deep sleep — the window where this helps most.
A cooler sleep surface to protect your deep-sleep stages.
Why this: A cooler core temperature overnight reliably extends deep sleep.
Why you: Your deep sleep dips on warmer nights — the Weather Resilience pattern.
Why now: Warmer nights ahead make the effect easy to feel this week.
We matched this to your low HRV and reduced deep sleep — not to a catalogue.
Your data stays with Humotron. We pass the match to the retailer — never your health signals.
Prices indicative · partners may vary by region.
Deep Dives for the Bigger Picture
Connects multiple metrics to uncover the patterns behind your energy, stress and recovery.
Your body stayed well regulated through most of the workday — usually a sign of good recovery and steady energy.
Each day is shaded by its workday stress score — your weekends are running hotter than your weekdays this month.
Higher meeting loads correlate with higher stress.
We refresh every %1$d paired days — your next is due around %2$s.
Your next Weather Resilience report is ready. This takes a few seconds to compose.
Your HRV thrives on cooler days. As temperatures rise, recovery isn’t as strong — your body prefers a chillier environment for optimal recovery.
Your %1$s is higher during work hours compared to recovery times.
There’s a rise in %1$s in the morning hours.
Your %1$s settles into a healthy dip through the night.
Not enough readings around your workouts yet to surface this lens.
Pick the one that fits best. We\'ll shape your whole experience around it — and you can change it anytime.
Bring every signal into one clear picture — and tell me what it actually means.
Go deeper on HRV, sleep and training load. Run experiments, chase the gains.
Personalised product and habit recommendations I can trust, with the reasoning shown.
Fix sleep, stress or energy with focused, practical daily nudges.
Your home will open on the Clarity layout, tuned to this goal.
Your home will open tuned to this goal.
Choose the areas you most want to understand first.
Press and hold any tile to see what it tracks.
We pair months of local weather with your biometrics to show how climate shifts move your recovery, sleep and BP. Each pairing gets its own report.
Deep Dives for the Bigger Picture
Connects multiple metrics to uncover the patterns behind your energy, stress and recovery.
One read on your whole body
How wound up are you, right now?
A two-minute read of your heart-rate variability against your own baseline — a live look at how your nervous system is coping.
Sit still, rest your hand and breathe normally. Keep the Ring snug so the signal stays clean.
When you feel tense, wired or oddly flat — or before a big moment, after a stressful patch, or at the end of a long day.
It reads the tiny timing differences between your heartbeats (HRV). More variability generally means a calmer, better-recovered nervous system.
Below baseline is a nudge to ease off and protect your evening. Above it, you\'re clear to push.
Is your body working harder than it should, right now?
A quick resting heart-rate read against your baseline — it tells you whether your body is genuinely at rest or quietly under load.
Stay seated and still for the read. If you\'ve just moved around, give yourself a minute to settle first.
When you feel physically tired, wired or \"off\" — especially if you\'re resting but your body still feels like it\'s working. Useful in afternoon slumps or before winding down.
It compares your heart rate right now with your personal resting baseline to gauge how much load your body is carrying.
Above baseline at rest is a sign to slow down and recover. At or below, you\'re clear to use the energy.
Is your blood well-oxygenated, right now?
A spot check of your blood-oxygen saturation against your usual level — a quick read on how well you\'re breathing and oxygenating.
Keep your hand still and resting below your heart. Stay relaxed and breathe normally.
When you feel foggy, low on energy or short of breath, after long indoor stretches, or after travel and poor sleep.
It measures the percentage of oxygen your red blood cells are carrying (SpO2) and compares it with your usual level.
A persistent dip below your usual is worth a closer look. At or near it, you\'re well-oxygenated.
Is your temperature drifting from your normal?
A read of your skin temperature against your personal baseline — an early signal of illness, poor recovery or a warm environment, often before you feel it.
Keep the Ring on and your hand still. Avoid taking this straight after a hot shower, workout or going outside.
When you feel unusually warm, restless before sleep, fatigued after workouts, or slightly \"off\" without a clear reason.
It reads your skin temperature as a deviation from your personal overnight baseline — small shifts show up here before you feel them.
A short-lived rise is usually environmental. A drift that holds is worth watching and protecting your recovery.
Takes about 2 minutes · stay still while it reads
Takes about 1 minutes · stay still while it reads
Takes about 45 seconds · stay still while it reads
Tap to view the full report
Every %1$s scan you’ve run, newest first. Open any one to see its full report.
Choose which readings from %1$s can notify you when they move out of range.
Make sure Bluetooth is on and your device is nearby
The Ring streams your heart, sleep and temperature signals around the clock, and runs the four instant scans on demand.
Take the Ring off its charger
Keep it close to your phone
The Band tracks heart rate, movement and strain through the day and syncs your activity straight into Track.
Keep it close to your phone
Step on and the Scale reads weight, body fat, lean mass, muscle and bone — sent straight to Track.
Place it on a hard, flat floor
Tap it once to wake it
The Cuff measures blood pressure and records an ECG, bringing cardiac-grade readings into Track.
Wrap it around your upper arm
Keep it close to your phone
If you don’t see your device, make sure it’s powered on and close to your phone.
Device found. Tap to select, then connect.
It’s paired and feeding Track. Take your first reading whenever you’re ready.
It’s paired and feeding Track. Your signals will start flowing in over the next few minutes.
It’s paired and feeding Track. Take your first reading whenever you’re ready.
